Requires ask (productivity/ask) and next-best-questions (autonomous-ai-agents/next-best-questions).

skills.name: next-best-questions
skills.description: The NEXT-BEST QUESTIONS to answer for an underspecified prompt, ranked (formerly 'information-gain'), by Expected Value of Sample Information (value = sqrt(U*EVSI)): projects plausible answers, scores plan-change x stakes, dedups/diversifies, reports pre-answer vs assume-default. Report-only. Requires the ask skill (install to productivity/ask first). OLLAMA_URL/INFOGAIN_* env-tunable.
